summary.intent: Make `evaluate` the default CLI subcommand so users can run `cli --url <url>` instead of requiring the full `cli evaluate --url <url>`.
summary.outcome: Added `{ isDefault: true }` to the Commander.js evaluate command definition in `src/cli/index.ts:25`, enabling the shorthand invocation. All 1351 tests passed, lint was clean, and the change was committed successfully.

repo: The project uses Bun as the runtime and test runner, with pre-commit hooks that run tests, lint, and typecheck.
The CLI entry point is `src/cli/index.ts` with a Commander.js-based program structure where `evaluate` is the sole subcommand.
The project builds to `./dist/bin/context-evaluator-darwin-arm64` for distribution.

code.finding: Commander.js `isDefault: true` option on a command makes it run when no subcommand is matched, enabling options like `--url` to work directly on the root program.

workflow: Tests and lint can be run in parallel with Bash tool calls since they are independent.
Pre-commit hooks enforce quality gates (tests, lint, typecheck) automatically on commit.

open_items: Verify the binary distribution (`./dist/bin/context-evaluator-darwin-arm64`) is rebuilt and tested with the new default command behavior.
